is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of chloroquine-resistant Plasmodium falciparum malaria in patients in Mali.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports Pfcrt 76 (T76), 220 (S220), 271 (E271), 326 (S326), 356 (T356), 371 (I371), and Pfmdr1 86 (Y86) with counts in Table 1.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Table 1 gives numerator/denominator counts, e.g. pfcrt T76 47/116 (41%), pfmdr1 Y86 58/115 (50%), pfcrt S326 13/46 (28%).

sub_country_location.evidence: Subjects enrolled in Mopti and Bandiagara in central Mali, but the frequency tables (Table 1, Table 2) pool samples across both sites; no site-level breakdown of marker frequencies is provided.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Subjects enrolled from August through December 1997 — a single collection window well within 3 years.

african_field_samples.evidence: Human clinical isolates from patients with uncomplicated falciparum malaria collected in Mopti and Bandiagara, Mali.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical drug-efficacy trial with molecular analysis of field samples.

duplicate_risk.evidence: New field collection from a drug-efficacy trial in Mali (1997); no explicit mention of consortium/network overlap, though the Malaria Research and Training Center in Mali has multiple related studies.

supplement.evidence: Frequencies are pooled across Mopti and Bandiagara; site-specific breakdowns are not in the main text. Detailed technique info is pointed to an external URL, but per-site frequency tables would be needed to meet sub-country resolution.

assessment.summary: Primary chloroquine-efficacy trial in Mali (Mopti and Bandiagara, Aug–Dec 1997) reporting P. falciparum pfcrt (76,220,271,326,356,371) and pfmdr1 (86) mutation frequencies with extractable numerator/denominator counts (Table 1). Collection window is within 3 years. However, the reported frequencies pool samples across the two study sites with no sub-national breakdown, so frequencies cannot be tied to a location below the two-town aggregate — failing the sub-country resolution requirement as reported.
exclusion_reasons: Marker frequencies are pooled across Mopti and Bandiagara without a site-level breakdown, so extractable frequencies cannot be tied to a single sub-national location.
